creator: hrs@FreeBSD.org
text: OCaml 4.02.3 (the version in the ports tree, lang/ocaml) seems to have a deadlock problem with compilation of math/coq.  Because I am working on upgrading it to 4.04.0 and it works fine, I am planning to fix this issue by upgrading the related ports including lang/ocaml.  Please be patient until it finishes.
